ApprovalRule.name: Aproval by the manager and the HR Manager
ApprovalRule.description: Approval by the manager of the caller at the first level. If there is no approval or rejection after 80 % of 70 hours delay, the substitute (manager of the manager) will be notified to approve the ticket. Approval by the HR Manager at the second level.
ApprovalRule.level1_rule: SELECT Person AS manager JOIN Person AS employee ON employee.manager_id = manager.id WHERE employee.id=:this->caller_id
